# Agent Guidance: Fornax Example

Authoritative program source: `project-plan-v4.md` (version `4`).
Current phase/gate: `validation` / `G2`.

## Required operating rules

1. Read `program.yaml` before substantive work.
2. Use canonical YAML records; Markdown under `generated/` is disposable.
3. Route work by workflow and consequence facts before execution.
4. Do not exceed either the work packet permissions or the actor ceiling.
5. Cite typed, subject-bound receipts for manual guards and elevated actions.
6. Satisfy producer/validator separation required by the assurance level.
7. Do not make claims stronger than passing linked evidence authorizes.
8. Stop when scope, permission class, source revision, or risk tier changes.

## Declared actors

| Actor | Kind | Permission ceiling | Capabilities |
|---|---|---|---|
| `human:project-owner` | human | production | product_outcomes, requirements, experience_design, operability_release, documentation_feedback, research_assurance, verification |
| `human:technical-lead` | human | sensitive | product_outcomes, requirements, experience_design, architecture, backend_delivery, integration_delivery, code_quality, verification, security_privacy, documentation_feedback, research_assurance |
| `agent:program-manager` | agent | local_write | product_outcomes, requirements, experience_design, documentation_feedback |
| `agent:runtime-integration` | agent | external_write | architecture, backend_delivery, integration_delivery |
| `agent:distributed-systems` | agent | external_write | architecture, integration_delivery |
| `agent:numerical-correctness` | agent | external_read | backend_delivery, code_quality, verification, research_assurance |
| `agent:network-security` | agent | sensitive | integration_delivery, security_privacy, operability_release |
| `agent:evidence-custodian` | agent | local_write | operability_release, research_assurance |

## Local control commands

```bash
agentic validate . --strict
agentic route <WORK-ID> --root .
agentic render .
```
